feed.title: bbcnews TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

entry.title: New video shows investigators inside the container vessel, Dali, to inspect damage and download the ship data. #FrancisScottKeyBridge #Baltimore #US #BaltimoreBridge #Bridge #Cargo #BridgeCollapse #Maryland #News #BBCNews
entry.content: New video shows investigators inside the container vessel, Dali, to inspect damage and download the ship data. #FrancisScottKeyBridge #Baltimore #US #BaltimoreBridge #Bridge #Cargo #BridgeCollapse #Maryland #News #BBCNews

entry.title: France's prime minister says a teenage girl will be sued by the state for falsely accusing her headteacher of striking her in a heated exchange over her wearing an Islamic head-covering. #France #Islam #Muslim #BBCNews
entry.content: France's prime minister says a teenage girl will be sued by the state for falsely accusing her headteacher of striking her in a heated exchange over her wearing an Islamic head-covering. #France #Islam #Muslim #BBCNews

entry.title: 50 years ago an armed kidnapper, Ian Ball, attempted to abduct the young princess and hold her ransom. #PrincessAnne #RoyalFamily #UKRoyalFamily #Archive #BuckinghamPalace #TheMall #London #MetPolice #BBCNews
entry.content: 50 years ago an armed kidnapper, Ian Ball, attempted to abduct the young princess and hold her ransom. #PrincessAnne #RoyalFamily #UKRoyalFamily #Archive #BuckinghamPalace #TheMall #London #MetPolice #BBCNews

entry.title: The 'Assume That I Can' campaign starring Madison Tevlin went viral on World Down Syndrome Day. #AssumeThatICan #WDSD24 #WorldDownSyndromeDay #DownSyndrome #Viral #MadisonTevlin #Champions #WhoDoYouThinkIAm #BBCNews

entry.title: This BBC Panorama clip is believed to be one of the first televised April Fools' pranks. #AprilFools #AprilFoolsDay #Spaghetti #Archive #Nostalgia #1950s #Television #Harvest #BBCNews
